gist.headline: Cortex Chat enters the chat
gist.blurb: A new interface for creative minds. Cortex Chat has been added to the community showcase, bringing a fresh way to interact with our models.
gist.summary: Added Cortex Chat, a new AI chat platform for creative assistance, to the community apps registry.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and launch Cortex Chat directly from the Pollinations app showcase.
gist.visual_concept: The Pollinations Bee having a conversation with a friendly robot that features a stylized pixel-art brain on its monitor. Represents the 'Cortex' (brain) and 'Chat' aspects.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot chatting with a cute robot that has a glowing pixel brain design on its monitor face. Lime green (#ecf874) and soft purple gradient background. Floating speech bubbles. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'CORTEX'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
